channel.title: Terraform on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Terraform on Arrans github.io

item.title: ministackorg/ministack
item.description: Ministack: Free, open-source local AWS emulator - 35+ services, Terraform compatible, real databases. Free forever. MIT licensed.

item.title: mikefarah/yq
item.description: yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processor

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: bregman-arie/sre-checklist
item.description: A checklist of anyone practicing Site Reliability Engineering

item.title: cloudandthings/terraform-aws-clickops-notifier
item.description: Get notified when actions are taken in the AWS Console.
